en.name: Level 74 — Stage Fright
en.shortDescription: A theatre stage of looping hallways populated by dream-like figures resembling people the visitor knows.
en.atmosphere: Theatrical and familiar at first, growing more unsettling as isolation deepens and hallucinations intensify.
en.tips: Leave through the trapdoors within two hours — longer stays badly erode your grip on reality.
